logger.doc:name: Start Log
logger.message: get covid case record by national id flow started

db:select.doc:name: Select record upon NationaID
db:select.db:sql: select case_id, source, case_type, first_name, last_name, phone, email, date_of_birth, national_id, national_id_type, street_address, city, state, postal, country from uhub where national_id=:nationaID

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload map ( payload01 , indexOfPayload01 ) -> { source: payload01.SOURCE default "", caseID: payload01.CASE_ID as String, caseType: payload01.CASE_TYPE default "", firstName: payload01.FIRST_NAME default "", lastName: payload01.LAST_NAME default "", phone: payload01.PHONE default "", email: payload01.EMAIL default "", dateOfBirth: payload01.DATE_OF_BIRTH as String default "", nationalID: payload01.NATIONAL_ID default "", nationalIDType: payload01.NATIONAL_ID_TYPE default "", address: { streetAddress: payload01.STREET_ADDRESS default "", city: payload01.CITY default "", state: payload01.STATE default "", postal: payload01.POSTAL default "", country: payload01.COUNTRY default "" } }

raise-error.doc:name: Raise error
raise-error.description: The server has not found anything matching the Request-URI

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "code": 404, "message": "Resource not found", "description": "The server has not found anything matching the Request-URI", "dateTime":"2021-05-31T06:18:02Z", "transactionId":"48n32920-69ne-47b4-907d-fa15869f3c4d" }
